title: Saro Create
description: This pack is perfect to have fun in Multiplayer with Friends
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0427ac7bee4d87cff012a2de57edf526d65dbcfd.png)

#### CurseForge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/saro-create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/saro-create)

This Modpack Is Perfectly Made For Playing With Friends In Multiplayer
The 3D Voice Chat And The 3D Audio Like Music Player Make This Even More Fun Than You Can Imagine
To Relax To Build And Just Have A Nice Time
For people who want to experience something more difficult can also sit on the Create Mod or the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod

 

A Nice Shader Mod Like A Nice Shader Make This Also A Very Nice Experience

 

This Modpack is based on Fabric

Info: Not Everything Is In The Forge Version

 

 

Hope you have fun with the pack
